_comment: German AfA (Abschreibung) rules for rental residential property. Source: §7 EStG, §7b EStG.

linear_2pct.name: Lineare AfA 2% (Standard)
linear_2pct.note: Standard rate for most existing residential buildings

linear_3pct.name: Lineare AfA 3% (Neubau ab 2023)
linear_3pct.applies_when: New construction completed on or after 01.01.2023
linear_3pct.note: Increased rate for new builds post-2022. §7 Abs.4 Satz 1 Nr.2b EStG

sonder_afa.name: Sonder-AfA §7b EStG (+5% für 4 Jahre)
sonder_afa.applies_when: Bauantrag between 01.01.2023 and 30.09.2030 (extended); rental residential; cost ≤€5,200/m²
sonder_afa.note: Can be combined with linear 3% AfA. Sonder-AfA extended to Sept 30, 2030 per Wachstumschancengesetz.

degressiv.name: Degressive AfA §7(5a) EStG (5-6% vom Restwert)
degressiv.applies_when: Construction start OR purchase contract between 01.10.2023 and 30.09.2029; residential rental
degressiv.note: 5% of residual book value per year. Can switch to linear AfA at any time when it becomes more favorable.

_15pct_rule.name: Anschaffungsnaher Herstellungsaufwand (15%-Regel)
_15pct_rule.description: If renovation costs within 3 years after purchase exceed 15% of Gebäudeanteil of Kaufpreis, ALL renovation costs must be capitalized (not immediately deductible). Applies even to costs that would normally be Erhaltungsaufwand.
